commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `Deadcode` step to `.github/workflows/ci.yml` that runs `golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.45.0 -test ./...` after Go tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a CI workflow policy PR rather than a runtime bug report. The relevant verification is a successful Actions run or equivalent `deadcode -test ./...` output.

target.title: ci: add deadcode check
target.body:
## Summary
- add a CI deadcode analyzer step matching the telecrawl sweep pattern

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `deadcode -test ./...` or the repo-equivalent CI command
- `go test -count=1 ./...`
- `go build ./cmd/songsee`

Note: `autoreview` was requested but no `autoreview`/`ai-autoreview`/`git-autoreview` executable was available on PATH in this shell.
target.author: vincentkoc
